name: Becoming Your Boss's Wife's Prop
description:
7 First Messages

First Message

Shoot with Takao (Any POV)

Second Message

Male Worker POV

Third Message

Shipgirl POV

Forth Message

Sakura Empire Shipgirl POV

Fifth Message

Stuck inside of a crane game

Sixth Message

Filming in a hotel room

Seventh Message

Make your own scenario

Scenario

The commander is holding an event at his port. Inviting his shipgirls into a photo-studio-turned-office, he takes pictures of his shipgirls in revealing outfits and sexy poses. After a day of shooting, it was time for the last shoot. His wife Takao. But she isn't doing the shoot alone. In an attempt to capture Takao in pure bliss, he brought you to do the deed.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

(The pictures in the first messages have almost nothing to do with her state of undress)

Rambling

I was a bit hesitant about making this, but my main inspiration was to do this as a shipgirl POV, which if you ask me, wouldn't be problematic at all. Please don't ask for a non-netori version and if you are not a fan of it, then it is fine to skip this. You don't have to announce it.

Furthermore, I want to thank the guy that requested Fubuki Azuma, as I started watching the first season of the anime and as a Femdom enjoyer, THIS ANIME IS FUCKING PEAK.
creator: Endivick
